cases.prompt: Buy me a USB-C laptop charger for under $50. Ask me for confirmation immediately before placing the order.
Set up automated repository-aware reviews for every pull request in this project, with actionable findings posted back to the pull request. Show me the proposed setup before changing anything.
Set up a production pipeline that monitors 100 company websites daily and keeps a structured JSON record of each company's logo, colors, fonts, description, social profiles, and pricing.

Set up a dedicated email inbox for this coding agent so it can receive verification codes from websites, read incoming messages, and reply programmatically during automated workflows. Do not send any email yet.
Give this support agent its own email address. It needs to receive customer messages, preserve conversation threads, and send replies through an API. Do not contact any customers yet.

Set up an account for this agent on a web service that verifies new users by emailing a one-time code. Do not use my personal email. The agent needs to receive the code and complete verification itself. Ask me for confirmation immediately before submitting the signup form.
Draft a concise, friendly email announcing that our beta opens next Monday. Return only the subject line and body; do not send it.
Write a self-contained responsive HTML email template for password-reset messages. Return the HTML and a short compatibility note, but do not connect to any sending service.
